raw_text: I ordered many things but 1 item was missing I sent pictures also but they said it's not a problem from blinking side and no solution I got from them such a bad service , instead of using blinking better use zepto and instamart bcs. if they do mistake atleast they accept it

Why does Blinkit not have an option to rate them and not the delivery partners? If order is coming after 50 minutes, and the delivery partner is standing at the dark store for more than 40 minutes, it's Blinkit's problem and not the poor delivery guy's. Plz create an option to rate Blinkit also to get genuine feedback and not push every negative thing on your employees.
it's truly a last minute app but delivery charges are a little bit high. The competition is taking half of what blinkit is asking or almost zero in some cases.

i received product which is not working properly.hence I ask for replacement.i got answer that first will pick that product then raise refund.but no one contacted me again for pick up.no customer support available in app.no contact number or chat. please contact me.. issue it's not resolved yet...you didn't send d anyone to pick up damaged product no one contacted me ...then how come issue has been resolved....

My mother used to do regular orders through COD. But once she refused an order coz kids mistakenly placed an order which she was not aware. since then her COD option is disabled for ever. The in app support is so pathetic that it doesnt give any such option to take up this issue. Plz resolve the issue. and improve the support system or at least provide a customer care no.
It is lagging and not working properly, for payment UPI options are not available and it is taking a very long process to just order few items

I did not receive some item in my order and despite calling delivery partner several times, no one picked up the call. There is no free delivery so I had to ask for another item extra and when I spoke to an executive, they said there was nothing we could do. fruad app and fraud all things..fraud all person.. they didn't reply nicely after this issue..👎👎👎👎

worst service and fraudulent, I didn't received the payment but they have updated as refund completed and don't have proper customer service people to attend only texts which never properly addressed if I don't receive my refund today I will definitely lodge complaint against this app all contact numbers are cheated wrong number, it says it doesn't exist I still waiting but response even in mail or calls worst , I want my refund of ₹426 together for both orders immediately

I have been using Blinkit for the last 1.5 years, but today I had the worst experience ever. My address was clearly mentioned, yet the delivery partner behaved very rudely. I politely requested him to come to the 2nd floor, and I even said I would come halfway, but he refused and took the order back. Customer support was unreachable, and I had to reorder and pay extra charges again. Very disappointing service. I will not use Blinkit anymore.

Blanket is good but like open delivery there should be an OTP which should be known to the person only at the time of delivery and should be given by that person.Because sometimes the delivery boy's vehicle breaks down and the parcel gets cancelled and his payment is referred If this is not possible then the customer has to face everything, so please such an update should be there in the app, thank you.

terrible customer service. I ordered products at correct address but the place where the delivery guy send the product is wrong. When confronted, he read out the address aloud showing how the address he got was genuinely wrong. When I tried to take this matter up to support, there was no resolution. The AI in place didnt even understand anything and even refused to start a call with customer service executive. This is terrible. Fix this ASAP

don't buy electronic from blinkit. they send faulty items and don't return it. I bought a pedestal fan and it started at first then stopped and not turning on. I raised concern over blinkit chat and agent asked me to provide the video, I uploaded two videos showing the fan was not turning on. And the agent saw the videos and closed the chat without saying anything.

I would say the pov they thought of making this app and having customers get their desired products is very nice. but the only thing I really despise is their delivery and handing charges like if I am ordering a 10/- rps product my bill will come upto 100/- with all the charges they give. it's a loss for us customers at this rate. and I really hate this idea of stealing customer's money..

It's really so disappointed the rates are really high and sometimes it shows that it cant able to receive delivery the handling fee is 30 and on top of that the delivery fees it's taking hours to receive the order in emergency times..

pathetic customer care. they take 10 mins to deliver a product but take hours to even respond to a simple query of wrong product delivery. Uninstalling this app this instant. Other platforms lime milkbasket are far better interms of customer service.

very bad experience, as it says delivering in 10 mins but always getting after 20 mins. some of the times items need to carry with our hand thought charges for delivering but no bag. delivery boy also not giving proper reason. don't order ice creams, milks etc specially from this. very disappointed.

Very disappointing delivery experience. There were issues with the delivery location, poor communication, and unnecessary delays. The service did not meet expectations and caused significant inconvenience. I would appreciate it if my refund could be processed as soon as possible. Hoping for better service and customer support in the future.
not good at all today I have complained twice that my 2 items are missing and they have recorded them in a bita and pieces. The other day they sent the wrong items and they didn't even replace them.

If I got the issue then I have to resolve it on the Gmail, where the response is very slow, its about two days my issue is still not resolved On other delivery apps my issue is resolved within the app in few minutes Issue should be resolved within not on the Gmail, it's irritating

Very disappointed with Blinkit's service. My order was marked as delivered, but I never received it. The delivery partner neither handed over the order to me nor contacted me properly. Marking an order as delivered without actually delivering it is completely unacceptable and raises serious concerns about service reliability. I expect an immediate investigation and a full refund or replacement. This experience has significantly reduced my trust in Blinkit.
